title: Binary bloat analyses
body:
Add a set of scripts to analyse the package dependencies and where the bloat comes from. Please read the commit messages for details and/or the `./dependencies/README.md`.

@baude PTAL

comments.body: :umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #3106) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
